query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**OpenAI** — No *new* funding round in June–July 2026. Its last round ($122B committed / $852B post-money) closed March 31, 2026. The June–July story is its **confidential IPO S-1 filing (June 8, 2026)** targeting up to a **$1 trillion** valuation, now reportedly leaning toward a **2027 listing**.

**Anthropic** — No *new* round in the window. Its **$65B Series H at $965B post-money valuation** closed/was announced ~May 28, 2026 (just before the window), described as potentially its last private raise before IPO.

**Mistral AI** — The **only company with an active/imminent round** in June–July 2026: first reported **June 12, 2026**, it's in talks to raise **~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23B) valuation**, mainly for compute/data-center buildout — nearly doubling its Sept 2025 €11.7B Series C. As of mid-July 2026, this round appears **not yet officially closed**.

Note on methodology: AskNews credits were exhausted, so I relied on WebSearch across Bloomberg, TechCrunch, CNBC, The Hill, and company sources, cross-validating key figures. The structured output with all data points and sources has been submitted.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation

sources.title: Mistral AI - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
sources.snippet: March 30, 2026 debt financing round of $830M; total ~$3.05B across 8 rounds from 52 investors.

key_facts: OpenAI's most recent completed round closed March 31, 2026 at an $852 billion post-money valuation with $122 billion of committed capital, co-led by SoftBank (Amazon ~$50B, Nvidia ~$30B, SoftBank ~$30B, plus ~$3B from retail investors).

OpenAI filed a confidential S-1 with the SEC on June 8, 2026, targeting a valuation of up to $1 trillion; by late June 2026 it was reportedly leaning toward a 2027 IPO rather than listing below $1 trillion.
OpenAI announced NO new private funding round in June-July 2026 (though a scheduled $10B SoftBank tranche from the March round landed ~July 1, 2026).
Anthropic closed a $65 billion Series H at a $965 billion post-money valuation, announced ~May 28, 2026, surpassing OpenAI's valuation and described as potentially its last private raise before IPO.

Anthropic's Series H was co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia, Capital Group, Coatue, and D1 Capital; ~$15B was previously committed hyperscaler capital including $5B from Amazon (April 2026).
Anthropic announced NO new funding round in June-July 2026; July coverage concerned the market impact of the completed Series H.
Mistral AI is reportedly in talks (first reported June 12, 2026) to raise ~€3 billion (~$3.5 billion) at a ~€20 billion (~$23 billion) valuation, primarily for compute/data-center infrastructure.
Mistral's rumored €20B valuation would nearly double its September 2025 Series C valuation of €11.7 billion (led by ASML).
As of mid-July 2026, Mistral's ~€3B round appears NOT yet officially closed; discussions were described as early-stage with terms potentially changing.
Mistral's most recent completed round before this was an $830 million debt financing round on March 30, 2026 for data-center expansion.
